message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 7 goals for the model.
Iteration 1 — setting up all pools (participants) first: Insurance Company as the main expanded pool, with Customer and Assessor as collapsed external participants.
Modeling the full claims handling flow inside the Insurance Company pool, with message exchanges to the collapsed Customer and Assessor pools.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 8 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 2 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

Fixing the two critical issues: (1) reverse the message flow into the message start event, and (2) align the final approval send + case closure in the same lane/pool sequence by moving the final-approval end event to the Claims Handler lane (no new elements, only corrections).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
Remove the SendTask followed by End Events. Replace them with End Events that sending messages instead.

I'll replace the send tasks that are immediately followed by end events with message end events, keeping the same outgoing message flows to the Customer (and removing the redundant send tasks + connecting flows).
Updating the model to remove the redundant SendTasks that are immediately followed by EndEvents, replacing them with Message End Events and reconnecting the preceding flow paths accordingly.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 5 issue(s) — details below.
You didnt changed the End Events to Message sending End Events. Change it.
I’ll change the customer-notification end events to Message End Events so they explicitly send the outcome to the Customer, and keep the process end behavior unchanged.
Converting the customer-notification end events into Message End Events (MessageEventDefinition) while keeping all existing sequence/message flows intact.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 5 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…
Updating the customer-notification end events to be Message End Events (MessageEventDefinition) so they correctly originate the existing message flows to the Customer.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 7 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 5 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…
Updating the five case-closure end events so they are Message End Events (MessageEventDefinition) and can legally originate the existing message flows to the Customer.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 7 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 5 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…
Updating the five case-closure end events to be Message End Events (MessageEventDefinition) so they can legally originate the existing message flows to the Customer.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ After 3 correction attempt(s), 5 critical issue(s) remain. Please review manually.
Change the labels from End Events that they fulfill the task.
I’ll update the End Event labels so they reflect the required customer outcomes (approval, rejection, or rejection due to deadline expiration) and clearly indicate case closure.
Renaming the five case-closure end events to the required customer-outcome labels.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 3 issue(s) — details below.
